  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:

  Log:

  deleting entries in an existing solr server.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Solr/
  
  PR:             ports/132666
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
